## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Igor Jankov for the Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relevant Experience:** As a "Service Delivery" lead at Proof, Igor managed 6–10 clients, handling end-to-end content production, editor management, and QA.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Problem-Solving:** Solved a 50% client feedback rate on a complex web novel project by creating detailed character/plot guides, proving his ability to fix systemic quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** The GrowthX role (3 clients, 5–26 posts/wk) is a direct fit for Igor's experience, which includes managing high-volume programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**GrowthX Strategy:** Shifting from 95% services to a 70/30 services/self-serve model, leveraging a new production tool to diversify revenue and client options.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Strategic Shift

  - [GrowthX is transitioning from a services-heavy model to a hybrid one.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Goal:** Move from 95% services to a 70% services / 30% self-serve platform mix.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Diversify revenue and serve clients who don't need full-service support.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Focus:** Engineering is enhancing the production tool, analytics, and AI visibility to enable this shift.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Managing Editor Role & Team Structure

  - [The Managing Editor (ME) role is now end-to-end content production.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [**Workload:** 3 client accounts, with weekly volume ranging from 5 editorial posts to 26 programmatic SEO posts.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Team:** MEs report to an Engagement Manager, who oversees \~8 total client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Tools:** GrowthX uses Linear, Notion, Airtable, Google Sheets, and Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Igor's Experience & Problem-Solving

  - [**Current Role (Proof):** "Service Delivery" lead, managing 6–10 clients.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Responsibilities:** Style guide creation, editor vetting, QA, and client feedback integration.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Groups similar clients (e.g., SEO automotive) to create efficiency templates.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**Key Project (Web Novels):**](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [**Problem:** A 50% client feedback rate on machine-translated Chinese web novels.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [**Cause:** Inconsistent character/plot details across 900+ chapters.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Solution:** Created detailed character/plot guides for editors to reference.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Drastically reduced feedback and inconsistency issues.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Feedback Response (Time Tracking):**](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Inconsistent time tracking due to adjusting to global freelancer schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Action:** Implemented a rigid schedule and required editors to conform, improving efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Megan:** Review interview notes and discuss with the hiring team.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Inform Igor of the next steps in the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/qzpiBYxjyeeytV-uJxBTBXmX3DEMzbqp?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
